## Portable Runtime Notes

- Keep evidence, assumptions, and unknowns explicit in every business artifact.
- Separate broader market intelligence from publishing-specific book competition.
- Treat scenario modeling, pricing, and risk as linked workstreams when decisions have financial impact.
